summary: Iteration 253: Tested P2 features (Pin Post to Profile, Edit Comment) and Light Mode theme fixes. Backend APIs all working correctly. Frontend features working. Messages page still has dark mode issue in chat area.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat view area (right panel) has hardcoded dark mode colors (bg-zinc-800, bg-zinc-900) that show BLACK background in light mode. This was reported in iteration 252 and persists.

action_items: Fix MessagesPage.js chat view to use theme-aware classes instead of hardcoded bg-zinc-800/bg-zinc-900
critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js chat area still uses hardcoded dark mode colors - needs theme-aware CSS classes

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All P2 features working, Messages page has light mode issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features (Pin Post, Edit Comment) are fully working. Backend APIs tested and passing. Frontend shows @username in PostCard, Pin option in PostMenu, Edit functionality in comments. Only remaining issue is MessagesPage chat area has black background in light mode.
verified_features: Backend: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/pin - toggles pinning a post to profile
Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id}/pin - unpins a post from profile
Backend: PUT /api/posts/{post_id}/comments/{comment_id} - edits a comment (only by owner)
Backend: Comments return is_edited and edited_at fields
Backend: Profile API returns pinned_post_id field
Frontend: PostCard shows @username instead of full name for comments
Frontend: PostMenu shows 'Pin to profile' option for own posts
Frontend: Comment edit functionality with Cancel/Save buttons
issues_found: MessagesPage chat area has BLACK background in light mode - hardcoded dark mode classes persist from iteration 252
rca_of_the_issue: MessagesPage.js uses hardcoded Tailwind classes like bg-zinc-800, bg-zinc-900, text-white instead of theme-aware classes like bg-background, text-foreground. This causes the chat area to display with dark colors even when the app is in light mode.
